en.extract:
The large Lifou white-eye (Zosterops inornatus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to New Caledonia.

The '''large Lifou white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops inornatus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[New Caledonia]].
